sub_modules.conv3d_index_decode: Combinational decoder from linear stream position to depth, row, and column coordinates.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Combinational valid-window detector for valid 3D convolution positions.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_addresses: Combinational 3D stencil address generator for the K1 by K2 by K3 window ending at the current voxel.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac_tree: Combinational multiply-accumulate block for the flattened 3D window and flattened kernel.
sub_modules.conv3d_done_logic: Combinational end-of-volume done flag aligned to the final valid convolution window.
